templates.name: Employee Design
templates.description: Design or retrain a multi-skill employee for a new business capability.

defaults.title: Design a new multi-skill employee
defaults.summary: Design an employee profile, recommend skills, and define training steps.

templates.name: Skill Match Audit
templates.description: Review the installed workforce against a new JD and recommend the best incumbent.

defaults.title: Audit the workforce for a new JD
defaults.summary: Score the current workforce, explain the best fit, and identify gaps.

templates.name: Market Recruitment
templates.description: Search for a new skill or employee composition when the current bench is weak.

defaults.title: Recruit an external skill candidate
defaults.summary: Search, vet, and onboard a candidate skill when the internal bench is insufficient.

templates.name: Incident Debrief
templates.description: Review an assignment outcome, update counters, and decide retain/probation/terminate.

defaults.title: Run a workforce debrief
defaults.summary: Classify the outcome, update HR records, and recommend the next action.

templates.name: Workflow Repair
templates.description: Repair a broken HR task flow or rebuild missing state from the audit trail.

defaults.title: Repair an HR workflow
defaults.summary: Diagnose broken task flow and restore a consistent HR state.

templates.name: Host Rollout
templates.description: Prepare a workforce rollout for Claude Code or OpenClaw with host-specific install notes.

defaults.title: Roll out workforce support to a host
defaults.summary: Prepare host-specific deployment, discovery, and verification steps.
